Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a codebase uploaded by a user for AI analysis, either via a ZIP file or a GitHub repository URL.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this project. This ID comes from an external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:N Project)

name.description: The name of the project, typically derived from the GitHub repository name or the uploaded ZIP file name.

sourceUrl.description: The URL of the GitHub repository if the project was ingested from a URL.

uploadFileName.description: The original file name if the project was ingested via a ZIP file upload.

status.description: The current processing status of the project (e.g., 'pending', 'processing', 'analyzed', 'failed').

uploadDate.description: The timestamp when the project was initially uploaded or linked.

lastAnalysisDate.description: The timestamp of the last successful AI analysis of the project.

summary.description: AI-generated high-level summary of what the project does.

techStack.description: AI-identified technologies and frameworks used in the project.

architecture.description: AI-described overview of the project's architectural patterns and components.

codeQualityScore.description: An optional numerical score representing the overall code quality of the project, if generated by AI.

CodeFile.title: CodeFile
CodeFile.description: Represents an individual code file or module extracted from an analyzed project, along with its AI-generated insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CodeFile entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this file belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N CodeFile)

filePath.description: The full path of the file relative to the project's root directory.

fileContent.description: The raw content of the code file. This can be large and may require careful storage/retrieval strategies.

explanation.description: AI-generated explanation or summary of the file's purpose and functionality.

detectedIssues.description: An array of AI-detected potential bugs, bad practices, or inefficiencies within this file.

suggestedImprovements.description: An array of AI-suggested improvements or fixes for issues in this file.

lastAnalyzedDate.description: The timestamp of the last AI analysis for this specific file.

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: Represents an interactive 'Ask AI' chat conversation specific to a particular project.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatSession entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this chat session is about. (Relationship: Project 1:N ChatSession)

title.description: A descriptive title for the chat session, possibly auto-generated or user-provided.

startDate.description: The timestamp when the chat session was initiated.

lastActivityDate.description: The timestamp of the last message sent or received in this chat session.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents an individual message exchanged within an AI chat session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

chatSessionId.description: Reference to the ChatSession this message belongs to. (Relationship: ChatSession 1:N ChatMessage)

senderType.description: Indicates who sent the message: 'user' or 'ai'.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

definition.description: Stores individual projects uploaded or linked by a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for explicit ownership and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the project, derived from Firebase Authentication.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific project.

definition.description: Stores individual code files extracted from a project, along with their AI analysis. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent project this file belongs to.

params.name: codeFileId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific code file within a project.

definition.description: Stores interactive AI chat sessions related to a specific project. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent project this chat session is about.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific AI chat session.

definition.description: Stores individual messages within an AI chat session. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'projectId', and 'chatSessionId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent project and chat session.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent project the chat session belongs to.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent chat session this message belongs to.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific message within a chat session.

firestore.reasoning: The recommended Firestore structure is designed following the core principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC, QAPs, and Invariants, specifically tailored for the 'AI Codebase Explainer & Debugger' application. It prioritizes a path-based ownership model, where all user-specific data is nested under a `/users/{userId}` root. This design ensures robust security rules that are simple to write and debug, and highly performant for common access patterns.
